title: baccharis salicifolia subsp. salicifolia
intro: Baccharis salicifolia subsp. salicifolia, also known as the tree or shrub baccharis, is a plant species native to South America. It is a type of shrub or small tree that has been used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, such as fever, respiratory issues, and digestive problems, due to its health benefits, including its antioxidant and expectorant properties. Baccharis salicifolia subsp. salicifolia can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or decoction for various health benefits and medicinal purposes.
